title: Using hashtags to search/filter Legal feedback in Updates
excerpt: Our Legal team would like to be able to easily search/filter on Legal feedback in Updates. Currently, the best way to do this is via a People search in Search Everything, which is not ideal if an employee leaves. Ideally…

posts.author: Percy123 (Greta Reinhold)
posts.cookedHtml: Our Legal team would like to be able to easily search/filter on Legal feedback in Updates. Currently, the best way to do this is via a People search in Search Everything, which is not ideal if an employee leaves. Ideally, we could search on any legal feedback provided by anyone on the Legal team by adding #legal to the end of their project comments/feedback in Updates.

posts.author: prmwe (Philipp)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love to use hashtags in updates. We use updates for documentation of phone and videocalls. Sometimes usefull information is collected there. If you could use an hashtag, the information would be easy to find for all other users.

Is there any progress about this topic by the monday team?
